info.name: [Regression] recommendation-service
info.description:
# [Regression] recommendation-service

**Owner**: Room Booking Services Team (api-team@example-hospitality.com | #booking-platform-eng)
**Status**: Stable
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-05

## Purpose

Core API services for the hotel room booking platform. Used by front-end booking flows, internal platform services, and CI/CD pipelines to validate availability, pricing, reservations, and cross-sell recommendations across all property environments.

## Quick Start

1. Select the appropriate environment (dev → nonprod-preprod)
2. Authenticate using OAuth2 client credentials via the Resolve Secrets request or your environment's pre-wired token
3. Run a health check to verify connectivity
4. Browse the endpoints below for your first real request

## Authentication

**Type**: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials

Credentials are resolved from AWS Secrets Manager (`api-credentials-{env}`) at runtime. In CI, the `CI=true` environment variable bypasses the secrets fetch and uses the mock server directly.

## Endpoints Overview

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | /auth/token | POST /auth/token — Happy Path |
| POST | /auth/token | POST /auth/token — Invalid Credentials (401) |
| GET | /health | GET /health — Service Healthy |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Happy Path (3-night stay) |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Shows Only Filter |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Missing orderId (400) |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Unauthorized (401) |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Order Not Found (404) |
| GET | /recommendations | GET /recommendations — Single Night Stay |
| POST | /recommendations/event-stays | POST /recommendations/event-stays — Happy Path |
| POST | /recommendations/event-stays | POST /recommendations/event-stays — Second Event (Upscale Funk) |
| POST | /recommendations/event-stays | POST /recommendations/event-stays — Missing Required Fields (400) |
| GET | /recommendations/configuration | GET /recommendations/configuration — Happy Path |
| GET | /recommendations/configuration | GET /recommendations/configuration — Unauthorized (401) |
| PUT | /recommendations/configuration | PUT /recommendations/configuration — Boost Entertainment |
| PUT | /recommendations/configuration | PUT /recommendations/configuration — Invalid Payload (400) |
| PUT | /recommendations/configuration | PUT /recommendations/configuration — Unauthorized (401) |

## Lifecycle

**Stable** — Production-ready, follows semantic versioning.

Breaking changes announced via workspace updates with 30 days notice.

## Support

Questions? Contact Room Booking Services Team at api-team@example-hospitality.com or #booking-platform-eng.

---

## Workspace Overview

# [RBS] Room Booking Core Services

**Owner**: Room Booking Services Team (api-team@example-hospitality.com | #booking-services)
**Status**: Stable
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-06

## Purpose

Core API services for the hotel room booking platform. Used by front-end booking flows, internal platform services, and CI/CD pipelines to validate availability, pricing, reservations, and cross-sell recommendations across all property environments.

This workspace covers two primary services:

| Service | Version | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| **Room Booking Core Services** | v3.0.0 | Availability, pricing, reservations, and customer credit across all hotel properties |
| **Recommendation Service** | v1.0.0 | Cross-sell and upsell engine — personalised offers post-booking and at key funnel steps |

## Quick Start

1. Select the appropriate environment (start with `dev` for local development, progress to `nonprod-preprod` for pre-release)
2. Authenticate using OAuth2 client credentials via the **00 - Resolve Secrets** request (present in Smoke, Contract, and Regression collections), or use your environment's pre-wired token
3. Run a health check (`GET /health`) to verify connectivity
4. Browse the endpoints below for your first real request

## Authentication

**Type**: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials

```
grant_type:  client_credentials
scope:       room-booking:read room-booking:write
tokenUrl:    /auth/token
```

Credentials are resolved from **AWS Secrets Manager** (`api-credentials-{env}`) at runtime. Each environment includes the corresponding secrets ARN. In CI, the `CI=true` environment variable bypasses the secrets fetch and uses the mock server directly — no secrets fetch is required during test runs.

## Endpoints Overview

### Room Booking Core Services (`/room-booking/v3`)

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/health` | Service health check |
| GET | `/availability/calendar` | Room availability calendar by date range |
| GET | `/availability/grid` | Multi-property availability grid |
| GET | `/availability/trip` | Trip-level availability with room type options |
| GET | `/pricing/rate-plans` | List available rate plans |
| POST | `/pricing/room-charges` | Calculate room charges for a stay |
| GET | `/pricing/customer-credit` | Retrieve customer loyalty credit balance |
| POST | `/reservations` | Create a new reservation |
| GET | `/reservations/{confirmationNumber}` | Retrieve a reservation by confirmation number |
| PUT | `/reservations/{confirmationNumber}` | Modify an existing reservation |
| DELETE | `/reservations/{confirmationNumber}` | Cancel a reservation |

### Recommendation Service (`/recommendation`)

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | `/auth/token` | Obtain OAuth2 access token |
| GET | `/health` | Service health check |
| GET | `/recommendations` | Retrieve personalised cross-sell/upsell offers |
| POST | `/events` | Submit event-linked stay preferences |

## Collections

Each service has four collection types, all stored as Postman v3 YAML:

| Collection | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **[Baseline]** | All endpoints with representative happy-path requests and saved example responses. Powers the mock server. |
| **[Smoke]** | Lightweight sanity checks — one request per critical path. Runs on every push. |
| **[Contract]** | Schema validation and response contract assertions against live or mock endpoints. Runs on every push. |
| **[Regression]** | Full suite of happy-path and error-path scenarios with test assertions. Used for pre-release validation. |

### Room Booking Core Services — Regression Test Coverage

| Folder | Scenarios |
|--------|-----------|
| **Availability** | Calendar happy path, invalid date range (400), unauthorized (401), with rate plan filter; Grid happy path, invalid date range (400); Trip happy path, invalid date range (400), with room type filter |
| **Pricing** | Rate plans happy path, with segment filter; Room charges happy path, missing required fields (400); Customer credit happy path, member not found (404) |
| **Reservations** | Create happy path, missing payment (400), unauthorized (401); Retrieve reservation, not found (404); Modify reservation, not found (404); Cancel reservation, not found (404) |
| **Health** | Health check |

## Environments

Eight environments are maintained, progressing from inner-loop development through to pre-production validation:

| Environment | Purpose |
|-------------|---------|
| `dev` | Local and inner-loop development. Points to the mock server by default. |
| `qa2` | Shared QA environment — integration testing with dependent services. |
| `qa4` | Secondary QA environment for parallel feature validation. |
| `preprod` | Pre-production environment matching production configuration. |
| `nonprod-dev` | Non-production replica of dev for CI pipeline runs. |
| `nonprod-qa` | Non-production replica of QA for automated testing. |
| `nonprod-stage` | Staging environment for release candidate validation. |
| `nonprod-preprod` | Non-production pre-production for final sign-off before release. |

## CI/CD Pipeline

The pipeline runs on every push/PR to `main` touching a spec, collection, or workflow file; on a schedule every 6 hours; and on manual trigger.

| Stage | Tool | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| **1. Governance** | `postman spec lint` | Lints the OpenAPI spec against the team's ruleset in Postman Cloud. Blocks tests if violations are found. |
| **2. Smoke Tests** | `postman collection run` | Fast sanity check across critical paths against the `dev` environment. |
| **3. Contract Tests** | `postman collection run` | Schema and response contract assertions validating implementation matches spec. |

## Lifecycle

**Stable** — Production-ready, follows semantic versioning.

Breaking changes are announced via workspace updates with 30 days notice. The spec-to-collection link in the Postman desktop app triggers a prompt to regenerate linked Baseline, Smoke, and Contract collections when the spec changes.

## Local Development

This workspace is connected to the repository in **Local Mode**. Collections, environments, and specs are stored as v3 YAML and synced to Postman Cloud using the Postman desktop app or CLI.

**To sync local changes to Postman Cloud:**
```sh
postman workspace push
```

**Resources file** (`.postman/resources.yaml`): maps each local file path to its Postman Cloud ID.

**Spec-to-collection relationships** are defined in `.postman/workflows.yaml`. Changes to a spec trigger collection regeneration for all linked collections when synced via the app.

## Support

Questions? Contact the Room Booking Services Team at api-team@example-hospitality.com or #booking-services.

item.name: Auth

response.name: POST /auth/token — Invalid Credentials (401)
response.body: {"code": "INVALID_CREDENTIALS", "message": "The client_id or client_secret provided is invalid."}

item.description: Regression tests for the authentication endpoints. Covers the happy path and invalid credentials (401) scenarios.

item.name: Health
item.description: Regression test for the GET /health endpoint. Asserts the service returns a 200 with a healthy status under normal conditions.

item.name: Recommendations

response.name: GET /recommendations — Happy Path (3-night stay)

item.description: Regression tests for the recommendations endpoints. Covers happy paths, missing orderId (400), order not found (404), unauthorized (401), and filter scenarios.

item.name: Events

response.name: POST /recommendations/event-stays — Happy Path
response.body: {"preferenceId": "PREF-2026-00001", "eventId": "EVT-BRUNOMARS-2026-06", "eventName": "Bruno Mars – An Intimate Night at Dolby Live", "propertyCode": "PARK_MGM", "submittedAt": "2026-05-05T22:40:00Z", "stayPreferences": {"checkIn": "2026-06-14", "checkOut": "2026-06-15", "adults": 2, "children": 0, "roomTypePreferences": ["DELUXE-KING", "PREMIUM-SUITE"], "budgetPerNight": {"min": 200, "max": 500, "currency": "USD"}}, "status": "PENDING_MATCH"}

item.description: Regression tests for POST /recommendations/event-stays. Covers the happy path, a second event variant, and missing required fields (400).

item.name: Configuration

response.name: PUT /recommendations/configuration — Invalid Payload (400)
response.body: {"code": "VALIDATION_ERROR", "message": "Request body validation failed.", "details": [{"field": "weights.roomScore", "issue": "Value must be a number between 0 and 1."}, {"field": "weights", "issue": "All weight values must sum to 1.0."}]}

item.description: Regression tests for the recommendation engine configuration endpoints. Covers happy paths, unauthorized (401), and invalid payload (400) scenarios.
